title: CC's Vanilla
description: Some small mods to optimize performance and better QOL.
body:
Some small mods to optimize performance and better QOL. Includes mods like Sodium, JEI, Appleskin, JourneyMap, and [others](https://github.com/HeroCC/CCVanilla/tree/main/mods). These mods provide extra information through the HUD, including food saturation, detailed info about items & recipes, and a minimap which shows your local surroundings. 

None of these mods require server-side changes to function, nor significantly affect vanilla gameplay (so no new blocks, items, etc). 

This mod is open-source and generated by Packwiz -- if you would like to suggest a mod, please create a PR for it in the linked GitHub (source) repo.
